context.projectOverview: Add a domain-agnostic vault storage layer to agent-bober where each per-domain repo is an Obsidian vault: markdown + YAML frontmatter is canonical source of truth and FactStore (SQLite) is a derived, rebuildable index over note frontmatter. This sprint builds the foundational note model + frontmatter round-trip I/O under a new src/vault/ module.

note: Contract, spec, and principles are on disk — read them from their paths. config.commands here resolve the empty bober.config.json commands map: build/typecheck via tsc, tests via 'vitest run' (NOT bare 'vitest' which watches). Stay on branch bober/medical-team; do NOT create a new branch (the medical-team line already carries this work).
